query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Ecumenical', 'Interdenominational, sometimes by extension, interreligious', 'Her ecumenical became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Edible', 'That can be eaten without harm, non-toxic to humans', 'The author hoped the new policy would edible tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Edict', 'A proclamation of law or other authoritative command', 'Her edict became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Edifice', 'A building, esp.  a large and imposing one', 'Scholars noted a striking edifice between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Edify', 'To instruct or improve (someone) morally or intellectually', 'Over time, the community learned to edify its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Editorial', 'Of, or relating to the preparing of material for publication', 'Over time, the community learned to editorial its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Educe', 'To draw out or bring out, elicit or evoke', 'The author hoped the new policy would educe tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Efface', 'To erase (a mark) from the surface', 'Over time, the community learned to efface its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Effective', 'Successful in producing a desired or intended result', 'The passage presents a effective portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Effectual', 'Producing the intended result, entirely adequate', 'Scholars noted a striking effectual between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Effeminacy', 'The quality of showing feminine traits (in a man)', 'The essay highlights the effeminacy of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Effeminate', '(of a man) showing traits regarded as typical of a woman', 'Critics argued that the plan might effeminate the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Effervesce', 'To emit small bubbles of dissolved gas, to froth or fizz', 'The author hoped the new policy would effervesce tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Effervescent', 'Giving off bubbles, fizzy', 'What seemed effervescent at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Effete', 'Of substances, quantities etc: exhausted, spent, worn-out', 'Scholars noted a striking effete between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Efficacious', 'Effective', 'What seemed efficacious at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Efficacy', 'The ability to produce a desired effect', '“The efficacy of the new drug was proven in trials.”', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Efficiency', 'The extent to which time is well used for the intended task', 'Critics argued that the plan might efficiency the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Efficient', 'Making good use of time or energy', 'What seemed efficient at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Effigy', 'A dummy or crude representation of something that is hated', 'Scholars noted a striking effigy between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Efflorescence', 'The state or a period of flowering', 'The essay highlights the efflorescence of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Efflorescent', 'Bursting into flower', 'The passage presents a efflorescent portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Effluvium', 'A gaseous or vaporous emission, especially a foul odour', 'Her effluvium became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Effrontery', 'Insolent or impertinent behavior', 'The essay highlights the effrontery of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Effulgence', 'A state of being bright and radiant, splendor, brilliance', 'Scholars noted a striking effulgence between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Effulgent', 'Shining, resplendent, with radiant splendor', 'The passage presents a effulgent portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Effuse', 'To give (a liquid, light, smell, or quality)', 'The author hoped the new policy would effuse tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Effusion', 'An outpouring of liquid', 'Her effusion became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Effusive', 'Expressing feelings in an unrestrained or heartfelt manner', 'The reviewer described the tone as effusive, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Egalitarian', 'Characterized by equality for all people', 'What seemed egalitarian at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Egocentric', 'Regarding the self as the center of all things', 'Scholars noted a striking egocentric between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Egoism', 'The tendency to think of self and self-interest', 'Over time, the community learned to egoism its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Egoist', 'A conceited and self-centered person', 'Her egoist became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Egotism', 'A tendency to talk excessively about oneself', 'Critics argued that the plan might egotism the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Egotist', 'A person who talks excessively about himself', 'Scholars noted a striking egotist between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Egregious', 'Outstandingly bad', 'The reviewer described the tone as egregious, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Egress', 'To exit or leave, to go or come out', 'The author hoped the new policy would egress tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Elaborate', 'To give further detail or explanation (about)', 'Over time, the community learned to elaborate its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Élan', 'Spirit, zeal, ardor', 'Scholars noted a striking élan between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Elapse', 'To pass or move by', 'Over time, the community learned to elapse its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Elasticity', 'Flexibility, resilience, adaptability', 'Her elasticity became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Elat', 'Very happy or proud, jubilant, in high spirits', 'Scholars noted a striking elat between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Electrolysis', 'The passage of an electriccurrent through an electrolyte', 'Her electrolysis became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Electrotype', 'To make such a plate', 'Over time, the community learned to electrotype its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Eleemosynary', 'Relating to charity, alms, or almsgiving', 'Critics argued that the plan might eleemosynary the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Elegy', 'A mournful or plaintive poem, a funeral song', 'The essay highlights the elegy of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Elicit', 'To draw out a response or reaction', '“The teacher’s question elicited an interesting discussion.”', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Eligible', 'Having the right to do or obtain something', 'The author hoped the new policy would eligible tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Eliminate', 'To completely destroy (a thing) so that it no longer exists', 'The author hoped the new policy would eliminate tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Elite', 'Of high birth or social position, aristocratic or patrician', 'Scholars noted a striking elite between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
